pool.baseline:
hey i need some help looking at some numbers from our latest audit in rotterdam. we've got some discrepancies between the WMS and the actual floor count for these electronic component SKUs. can you look at this table and help me figure out what might be causing these small recurring gaps?

| SKU | Description | WMS Count | Physical Count | Diff |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| EC-992-B | Micro-Capacitor 10uF | 4502 | 4488 | -14 |
| EC-104-A | Logic Gate Array | 1205 | 1198 | -7 |
| EC-003-S | Resistor Net 50R | 8940 | 8912 | -28 |
| EC-771-X | Voltage Regulator | 312 | 310 | -2 |

pool.baseline:
hey i'm looking at this contract for a new gig and i dont really get the indemnification part. can u explain what it means for me specifically? here is the text:

"The Consultant shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Client and its officers, directors, and employees from and against any and all claims, damages, losses, liabilities, costs, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising out of or resulting from the Consultant's performance of the Services, provided that such claim, damage, loss, liability, cost, or expense is attributable to bodily injury, sickness, disease or death, or to injury to or destruction of tangible property, but only to the extent caused by the negligent acts or omissions of the Consultant."

pool.baseline:
hey, i'm seeing some weird 500 errors on our /api/v1/checkout/complete endpoint. it's super intermittent, like maybe 5% of requests fail. i checked the logs but they're pretty thin, just saying 'Internal Server Error' without a stack trace in the main application log. i'm attaching a snippet of the access logs and the env config below. can you help me figure out what might be causing this?

access_log:
192.168.1.45 - [12/Oct/2023:14:22:01 +0000] "POST /api/v1/checkout/complete HTTP/1.1" 500 152 "-" "Mozilla/5.0..."
192.168.1.12 - [12/Oct/2023:14:22:05 +0000] "POST /api/v1/checkout/complete HTTP/1.1" 200 1240 "-" "Mozilla/5.0..."
192.168.1.89 - [12/Oct/2023:14:22:12 +0000] "POST /api/v1/checkout/complete HTTP/1.1" 500 152 "-" "Mozilla/5.0..."

env_snippet:
DB_TIMEOUT=5s
MAX_CONNECTIONS=50
REDIS_URL=redis://cache-cluster:6379/0
